ddls:
CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine within the facility */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the machine was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the machine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_types" (
  "machine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine type */,
  "machine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine type (e.g., pumps, compressors, gearboxes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the machine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_machine_type" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "machine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id", "machine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine from which the reading was taken */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Monitoring cycle number */,
  "sensor_measure_2" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 2 */,
  "sensor_measure_3" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 3 */,
  "sensor_measure_4" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 4 */,
  "sensor_measure_7" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 7 */,
  "sensor_measure_8" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 8 */,
  "sensor_measure_11" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 11 */,
  "sensor_measure_12" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 12 */,
  "sensor_measure_13" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 13 */,
  "sensor_measure_15" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 15 */,
  "sensor_measure_17" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 17 */,
  "sensor_measure_20" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 20 */,
  "sensor_measure_21" REAL /* Reading from sensor measure 21 */,
  "rul" INTEGER /* Predicted remaining useful life (RUL) in hours */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, vibration, pressure) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_machine" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id", "machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine on which maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance activities carried out */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician or engineer who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "maintenance_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type (e.g., routine, corrective, predictive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_maintenance_type" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id", "maintenance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, engineer, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., potential failure, maintenance required) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine analyzed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis performed */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine scheduled for maintenance */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Planned activities for the maintenance */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the user assigned to perform the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedule_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine for which the summary is generated */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Monitoring cycle number */,
  "average_rul" REAL /* Average remaining useful life (RUL) calculated for this cycle */,
  "max_rul" REAL /* Maximum RUL recorded during this cycle */,
  "min_rul" REAL /* Minimum RUL recorded during this cycle */,
  "standard_deviation_rul" REAL /* Standard deviation of RUL for this cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_summary_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the machine learning model */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Serialized machine learning model data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
